scripts.dev:backend: cd backend && cargo watch -w src -w Cargo.toml -w ../subagents -- cargo run -- --port 3001 --dev-tunnel
scripts.build: npm --prefix helper install && npm --prefix helper run build && npm --prefix frontend run build && cargo build --release --manifest-path backend/Cargo.toml
scripts.install:bin: npm --prefix helper install && npm --prefix helper run build && npm --prefix frontend run build && cargo install --path backend --force && npm run clean:helper-cache
